data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding attribution links and conversion tracking windows.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Attribution links and conversion tracking windows', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking and financial processes but do not include any checks or validations related to attribution links or conversion tracking. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of validation for attribution links and conversion tracking windows.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
